landing.heroTitle: The marketing team you never had.
landing.heroSubtitle: Free AI tools to understand your customers and write your marketing — no agency, no experience needed.
landing.toolsSubtitle: Know who to talk to. Know what to say.
landing.segmentDesc: Find out who actually walks through your door — and what each group needs from you.
landing.campaignDesc: Generate a complete, ready-to-post marketing campaign in under a minute.
landing.step1Desc: Choose to understand your customers or write a campaign. No setup, no login.
landing.step2Desc: Tell the AI about your business in plain English. Takes about 60 seconds.
landing.step3Desc: Real insights and ready-to-use content — copy, paste, post. Done.
landing.builtFor: Built for the business owner doing everything themselves
landing.bottomCtaDesc: Thousands of small business owners are finding their best customers and writing better marketing with AI4SMB. It's free, it's fast, and it takes less than two minutes.
landing.footerDesc: Free AI marketing tools for small businesses.
landing.testimonialEmpty: Be the first to share your experience!

segment.pageSubtitle: Choose how you want to analyze your customer base
segment.askDesc: Answer a few quick questions about your business — or see instant benchmarks for your industry.
segment.dataDesc: Upload a spreadsheet or paste sales data from Square, Clover, Toast, or any POS system.
segment.textDesc: Paste your Google, Yelp, or social media content to understand who's talking about you.
segment.guideMe: Not sure? Let our AI guide you
segment.privacyNote: Your data stays private. Any files or text you provide are processed in your browser or anonymized before analysis. Nothing is stored.
segment.subAskTitle: How would you like to start?
segment.subDataTitle: What kind of data do you have?
segment.subTextTitle: What would you like to analyze?

generate.customPlaceholder: Describe your business in a few words...
generate.locationPlaceholder: City or region, e.g. San Francisco, CA
generate.step2Subtitle: Pick a goal, then hit create
generate.addDetails: + Any details you'd like to add? (optional)
generate.detailsPlaceholder: e.g. We're open late on Fridays, our specialty is gluten-free
generate.goalDesc_new_customers: Bring in new foot traffic or online visitors
generate.goalDesc_promotion: Limited-time offer, grand opening, holiday special
generate.goalDesc_retention: Re-engage people who haven't visited in a while
generate.goalDesc_launch: New product, menu item, or service
generate.goalDesc_surprise: We'll give you our best idea for your business

chat.title: AI Strategist
chat.greeting:
Hey! Tell me about your business and what you want to achieve — I'll build you a campaign.

Example: "I run a coffee shop and want more morning customers."
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

interview.customPlaceholder: Describe your business in a few words...
interview.locationPlaceholder: City or region, e.g. New York, NY
interview.step2Subtitle: Answer what you know — skip what you don't
interview.customerTypesLabel: Who comes in? (select all that apply)
interview.visitFreqLabel: How often do regulars come back?
interview.vipLabel: Do you have customers who spend or visit much more than average?
interview.vipPlaceholder: Describe them briefly (e.g. 'morning coffee crowd, come every weekday')
interview.discoveryLabel: How do most customers find you? (select all that apply)
interview.extraNotesLabel: Anything else you've noticed about your customers? (optional)
interview.extraNotesPlaceholder: e.g. we get lots of first dates on Fridays, parents bring kids after school, office groups order in bulk...
interview.metaLabel: Based on your knowledge of your customers

benchmark.title: Industry Benchmarks
benchmark.subtitle: Pick your business type and get typical customer segments instantly
benchmark.disclaimer: Based on industry patterns, not your specific data
benchmark.locationPlaceholder: City or region, e.g. Austin, TX
benchmark.metaLabel: Based on industry benchmarks for this business type

auth.syncPrompt: Sign in to sync your history across devices
auth.noPassword: No password needed · Your data stays private
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link to sign in.

postAgent.title: Ready to Post
postAgent.subtitle: Let our AI format your campaign for each platform — optimized for character limits, hashtags, and best practices.

history.title: Your History
history.subtitle: Saved automatically on this device
history.emptyDesc: Generate a campaign or analyze your customers to get started.
history.syncNote: Sign in to sync across devices.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.signInPrompt: Sign in to save your work across devices and track your usage.

review.textInputPlaceholder: e.g. I used the campaign generator and it helped me reach more customers in my area.
review.namePlaceholder: e.g. Jane Smith, Sunny Cafe, or a future business name
review.locationPlaceholder: City or region, e.g. San Francisco, CA
review.thanks: Review submitted! It will appear after approval.
review.npsQuestion: How likely are you to recommend AI4SMB to a friend or colleague?
review.nameLabel: Your name or business name (current or future)
review.consentDisplay: I agree that my review may be displayed publicly on the AI4SMB website.
review.consentDisplayNamed: I agree that my review and name may be displayed publicly on the AI4SMB website.
review.consentContact: AI4SMB may contact me for follow-up or a featured testimonial.
review.privacyNote: Your session data is never shared without your consent.

posPaste.title: Paste Transaction Data
posPaste.subtitle: Copy from Square, Clover, Toast, or any spreadsheet and paste it below
posPaste.squareSteps: Dashboard → Reports → Transactions → Export → copy the table
posPaste.cloverSteps: Dashboard → Reports → Sales Summary → export CSV
posPaste.spreadsheetSteps: Select your data including headers → Ctrl/Cmd+C → paste below
posPaste.placeholder:
Paste your transaction data here (with headers in the first row):

Date	Amount	Item	Customer Type
2026-02-01	$45.00	Coffee + Pastry	Regular
2026-02-01	$12.50	Latte	New
2026-02-02	$89.00	Catering Order	Business
posPaste.metaLabel: {count} transactions analyzed from your POS data
posPaste.errorNoRows: Couldn't detect any rows. Make sure the data has headers in the first row.
posPaste.errorNoData: No data rows found after the header.

reviewAnalysis.title: Analyze Your Reviews
reviewAnalysis.subtitle: Paste your Google or Yelp reviews — the AI finds patterns in what customers say
reviewAnalysis.searchPlaceholder: Type your business name and city...
reviewAnalysis.autoPullNote: We'll pull your latest Google reviews automatically. Paste more below for deeper insights.
reviewAnalysis.textPlaceholder:
Reviews will appear here after searching, or paste manually...

Example:
★★★★★ 'Best coffee in the neighborhood! The baristas remember my order.'

★★★★☆ 'Quick stop on my work commute. Usually grab a latte and a croissant.'
reviewAnalysis.errorNoReviews: No reviews found for this business.
reviewAnalysis.errorFetchFailed: Failed to fetch reviews. You can still paste them manually.

socialAnalysis.title: Social Audience Analysis
socialAnalysis.subtitle: Paste your bio, recent posts, and comments — the AI identifies who engages with your brand
socialAnalysis.tip1: Your Instagram, Facebook, RedNote (小红书), or WeChat bio
socialAnalysis.tip2: 5-10 recent post captions that got engagement
socialAnalysis.tip3: A few comments from followers (especially recurring ones)
socialAnalysis.tip4: Your follower count and any demographics you know
socialAnalysis.tip5: Which posts performed best vs. worst
socialAnalysis.tip6: RedNote note titles, saves/likes counts, or WeChat Moments/article reads
socialAnalysis.textPlaceholder:
Paste your social content here...

Example:
Bio: 'Austin's favorite neighborhood coffee shop ☕ | Fresh pastries daily | Dog-friendly patio'

Post 1 (92 likes): 'Your Monday needs our oat milk latte and a sunny patio seat 🌞'
Comments: 'My morning ritual!' / 'Best spot to WFH' / 'Bringing my pup tomorrow!'
socialAnalysis.metaLabel: Based on your social media content

imageGen.unavailable: Image generation is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.

teachMe.title: Your AI Consultant
teachMe.subtitle: {count} questions about your customers. Takes about 2 minutes.
teachMe.metaLabel: Based on your guided consultation answers
teachMe.q1: What type of business do you run, and where is it located?
teachMe.q2: Describe a typical customer — who are they, and why do they come to you?
teachMe.q3: Do you notice different types of customers? Tell me about the distinct groups you see.
teachMe.q4: Which customers come back most often, and which ones tend to spend the most?
teachMe.q5: What's the biggest challenge you face with your customers right now?

csvUpload.title: Upload Customer Data
csvUpload.subtitle: Upload a CSV of your customer data and AI will find your audience segments
csvUpload.dropZone: Drop your CSV here or click to browse
csvUpload.dropZoneHint: Customer data, sales export, email list — any CSV works
csvUpload.trySample: Try with sample coffee shop data
csvUpload.privacyDesc: Files are processed entirely in your browser. Only anonymous statistics and a small sample (with names and emails removed) are sent for AI analysis. Nothing is stored.
csvUpload.contextPlaceholder: e.g. We're a coffee shop in Austin, TX
csvUpload.errorParse: Could not parse any data from this file. Make sure it's a valid CSV.
csvUpload.errorTooMany: File has more than 10,000 rows. Please use a smaller dataset.
csvUpload.errorParseFailed: Failed to parse the file. Make sure it's a valid CSV.
